name: sensible-ralph
description: Autonomous overnight execution of Approved Linear issues, with safety, structure, traceability, composability, and deliberation.

design_state.title: In-Design state name
design_state.description: Linear workflow state while an interactive /sr-spec session is open (default: In Design)

approved_state.title: Approved state name
approved_state.description: Linear workflow state for issues ready to dispatch (default: Approved)

in_progress_state.title: In-Progress state name
in_progress_state.description: Linear workflow state while a session is running (default: In Progress)

review_state.title: In-Review state name
review_state.description: Linear workflow state after /prepare-for-review (default: In Review)

done_state.title: Done state name
done_state.description: Linear workflow state after merge (default: Done)

failed_label.title: Failed label
failed_label.description: Label applied when a session fails or exits clean (default: ralph-failed)

stale_parent_label.title: Stale-parent label
stale_parent_label.description: Label applied to In-Review children whose parent was amended (default: stale-parent)

coord_dep_label.title: Coordination-dependency label
coord_dep_label.description: Label applied by /sr-spec when its coord-dep scan adds blocked-by edges; cleared by /close-issue (default: ralph-coord-dep)

worktree_base.title: Worktree base directory
worktree_base.description: Directory under repo root for session worktrees (default: .worktrees)

model.title: Claude model
model.description: Model to use for dispatched sessions (default: opus)

stdout_log_filename.title: Session log filename
stdout_log_filename.description: Per-session stdout log file inside the worktree (default: ralph-output.log)
